text.title: Strategy Memo Template Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Strategy Memo Template output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: single named PM / GM / founder handle
exactly three; each {name, anti_bet, metric, target, deadline}
≥3 links to grounding data (metrics dashboards, interview notes)
≥2 stakeholders who reviewed before the meeting

forbidden.pattern: any bet without anti_bet OR metric OR deadline

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim long prose fields to fit limits while preserving numeric claims, named tools, and citations.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: Every required field populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
